name: infinite_drift_stars_v2_ar.glsl
description: Updated version of Infinite Drift starfield. Smooth diagonal-scrolling multi-layer starfield with parallax depth, magenta→purple→blue→cyan→green palette. Select stars click into bright audio-reactive halos on transients while the rest twinkle gently independent of the music. Subtle nebula background wash and edge vignette.

name: infinite_drift_stars_ar.glsl
description: Smoothly scrolling diagonal starfield with 5 depth layers and parallax. Stars are colored across a magenta→purple→blue→cyan→green palette by ID. 20% of stars are designated audio-reactive: each listens to a specific frequency bin and "clicks" into a bright glow halo on transients. The remaining 80% twinkle gently independent of audio. Subtle background nebula wash and edge vignette complete the depth.

name: plasma_spectrograph_ar.glsl
description: Continuous fibrous plasma stream that maps the live frequency spectrum to color bands across its cross-section — magenta (sub-bass) through purple, blue, cyan, to green (highs). Domain-warped directional FBM noise creates organic striation and turbulence. Each color band's brightness is driven by its actual audio energy. Includes a hot white-magenta core pulse on bass hits, filament edge highlights, and a soft bloom haze.

name: saw_wave_plasma_ar.glsl
description: Sawtooth-colored particle stream — audio-reactive 3D plasma flow. 8 depth layers of particles stream along a tilted axis with curl-noise turbulence. The saw-wave color palette cycles magenta→purple→blue→cyan→green with sharp resets. Bass drives glow intensity, particle size, stream spread, and flow speed. White-hot core hotness near the stream center. Orbiting camera with slow drift.

name: particle_nebula_ar.glsl
description: Audio-reactive 3D particle nebula with Fresnel edge glow. 7 layers of drifting particles fill a volumetric cloud with teal-to-blue color depth gradient. Per-particle Fresnel shading simulates tiny spheres glowing at their edges. Bass drives camera FOV and orbit sway; per-particle FFT samples control individual size and glow. Scattered bright star particles and a subtle procedural nebula wash complete the depth.

name: Paez_Plasma Orb.glsl
description: Bass-reactive plasma orb from PAEz. A looping interference pattern of sine waves creates a pulsing orb of color. Bass drives animation speed, UV warp strength, orb zoom (breathe effect), and brightness pump via tanh tone mapping. 4x AA samples for smooth edges.

name: cdak_oneoff_v4.glsl
description: cdak tunnel port V4 â€” introduces audio reactivity for heavy drum beat music alongside the stable camera from V3. Bass punches up the thickness and intensity of the blue/purple edge detection lines, shifts their colors based on mids/highs, and adds a pulsing warm glow.

name: cdak_oneoff_v2.glsl
description: cdak tunnel port V2 â€” adds MusicCave-style audio streak glow. During raymarching, FFT energy is sampled at each step based on tunnel depth (frequency bins mapped to Z position), accumulating bright warm streaks wherever the ray grazes a surface. On loud transients the architecture lights up with orange-white fire streaks that follow the geometry edges and fractal lattice detail. All other audio reactivity from V1 retained (bass specular pulse, broadband edge glow). No camera wobble.

name: cdak_oneoff.glsl
description: Verbatim GLSL port of cdak 4K intro by Quite & Orange (1st at Chaos Constructions 2010). Two-pass buffer system: Buffer A raymarches the architectural tunnel and fractal lattice geometry; Image pass runs the original Sobel edge detection producing the characteristic bluish-purple edge lines, plus volumetric glow and tone curve grading. Stable version — no audio wobble on camera.

name: DD - New Sig2.glsl
description: Signature piece combining a generative NewSig tiled background, @OneHung SDF text with a Stargate kawoosh water raymarcher. The 25-second looping timeline opens with a giant spiral-in of blocky '@OneHung' lettering over a colorful procedural cell-grid, then at 11.5s a gyroid-FBM portal explodes outward with a twisted-space capsule kawoosh. Audio drives the outer frequency-monitor ring radius and pulses the text glow. Fire rendering illuminates hot cells and text outlines with orange flame.

name: Edge Plasma.glsl
description: Audio-reactive edge tendril shader. Electric plasma tendrils reach inward from screen borders, leaving the center clear for compositing. Purple-to-magenta cosine palette with blue-white electric cores and orange-gold plasma nodes. Bass drives tendril depth and turbulence; mids modulate warp speed; highs add fine electric detail and sparkle. Black background ideal for Screen/Add blend mode.

name: Where Is Her Mind Plasma.glsl
description: Plasma Wreath â€” audio-reactive electric plasma ring with Rive vector feathering. Deep purple and electric blue tendrils with hot orange highlights at peak intensity. Hollow center for compositing. Bass breathes the ring radius and drives turbulence; mids modulate plasma density and flicker.

name: Rainbow Gyroid Orb.glsl
description: Audio-reactive rainbow gyroid orb with plasma core. A centered gyroid cage structure cycles through full-spectrum rainbow hues driven by bass. Features fresnel-lit plasma, rainbow veins, atmospheric cage glow, and screen-wide bass pulse. Colors shift dynamically with music intensity.

name: AA- Bioluminescent Glass Ribbons.glsl
description: Bioluminescent Glass Ribbons - Smooth glassy organic ribbons with reflections. Features bass-driven ribbon pulsing, mid-frequency twist control, bass-boosted glow, mid-frequency color shifts, and subtle high-frequency camera shake. Includes realistic glass material with reflectivity and refraction.
author: Shadertoy

name: AA - Chroma Orbital 2.glsl
description: Chroma Orbital - Diverse Shapes Edition. Varied orbiting objects including Boing, RubberCube, Gyroid, and Torus. Features audio-reactive pulsing with bass, mid-frequency orbit influence, and high-frequency sparkle. Includes three-point lighting, chromatic aberration, and post-processing effects.
author: Shadertoy

name: AA - MilkDrop1.glsl
description: MilkDrop Tribute - Classic MilkDrop aesthetics with modern GLSL implementation. Features wave displacement, geometric overlays, color cycling, and beat-reactive pulsing. Includes beat detection with hysteresis, shape memory, and evolving parameters driven by audio frequency bands.
author: Shadertoy

name: Hide and Seek - Close Orb.glsl
description: Crystalline Void - Close Orb Version by @OneHung. Same as Hide and Seek but with the gyroid orb positioned closer to the camera for better visibility. Crystalline/void aesthetic with audio-reactive geometry that breathes and pulses. Features procedural iridescent materials, smooth camera path through infinite recursive structure, and multi-bounce reflections.

name: Eagle.glsl
description: Homeward by David Hoskins - A crow flying over a procedural landscape. Multi-pass shader with data storage (Buffer A), landscape rendering (Buffer B), and main image with lens flare.

name: MusicCave.glsl
description: Audio-reactive raymarched procedural cave with stage-based camera choreography. Features composite sine-based cave geometry with pillars that respond to audio frequency data. Combines edge detection for sharp contours, volumetric glow effects, and dynamic camera rotations that change based on stage progression. Pillars and cave walls react to audio input creating synchronized visual pulsing.

name: ForbiddenBeats.glsl
description: Audio-reactive mathematical attractor visualization with rainbow colors. Created by diatribes. Features iterative attractor functions that create flowing, organic patterns synchronized to music. Bass frequencies modulate the attractor parameters while beat detection quantizes time progression. Rainbow hues cycle based on iteration count and position, with saturation and brightness responding to audio levels. Shadertoy ID: [TBD]

name: wcfXRf_Frunnel9Insomnia.glsl
description: Frunnel 9: Insomnia - Fractal tunnel flight with organic camera movement. Created by diatribes. Features raymarched fractal geometry with iterative folding transformations creating intricate tunnel structures. Dynamic camera path follows parametric curves with smooth orbital motion around procedurally generated tunnel centerline. Shadertoy ID: wcfXRf

name: 332XRK_ColorSwirl.glsl
description: Color Swirl - Compact raymarched scene with colorful swirling patterns. Created by diatribes. Features efficient code-golfed raymarching with iterative sine-based distortions creating flowing color fields. Rotation matrices and multi-scale noise combine to produce hypnotic swirling motion. Shadertoy ID: 332XRK

name: 332XW3_ElectricFogTunnel.glsl
description: Electric Fog Tunnel - Volumetric tunnel flight through electric fog effects. Created by diatribes. Features raymarched tunnel with parametric path following and multi-scale noise distortions creating electric fog appearance. Dynamic color gradients shift based on position and time. Shadertoy ID: 332XW3

name: 332yWD_CoreBurn.glsl
description: Core Burn - Dual volumetric effects combining fire and heart shapes. Created by diatribes. Features two separate raymarched volumetric functions blended together: a rotating fire column with multi-scale noise and a pulsing heart shape with organic distortions. Warm color palette with red and orange tones. Shadertoy ID: 332yWD

name: 33B3Rm_AbstractInterference3.glsl
description: Abstract Interference 3 - Complex tunnel flight with fractal orb and interference patterns. Created by diatribes. Features dual-pass raymarching: first through a parametric tunnel with tracking orb, then through fractal geometry with iterative folding. Red orb creates interference patterns when hit. Dynamic camera with rolling motion. Shadertoy ID: 33B3Rm

name: 33BSzt_FractalStrandsDemo.glsl
description: Fractal Strands Demo - Colorful fractal strands flight with turbulence. Created by diatribes. Features camera following parametric path through rotating fractal geometry with 9 iterations of sine-based folding. Turbulence distortions and dynamic rotation create flowing strand-like structures. Distance-based color accumulation and tone mapping. Shadertoy ID: 33BSzt

name: 33f3WH_FlowerTunnel.glsl
description: Flower Tunnel - Fractal tunnel with flower-like patterns. Created by diatribes. Features camera following sinusoidal path through fractal geometry with 6 iterations creating organic flower shapes. Dynamic scaling based on z-position creates pulsing effect. Inverted color scheme with distance fade. Shadertoy ID: 33f3WH

name: 33GGWd_CoffeeClouds.glsl
description: Coffee Clouds - Volumetric cloud-like formations with warm tones. Created by diatribes. Features raymarched volumetric rendering with multi-scale noise creating coffee-colored cloud patterns. Camera movement with gentle oscillation. Radial gradient vignette effect. Shadertoy ID: 33GGWd

name: 33jSDc_ColorRipples.glsl
description: Color Ripples [273] - Colorful rippling plane with rotation. Created by diatribes. Features raymarched plane with multi-scale sine distortions creating ripple effects. Rotating geometry and color cycling based on distance. Compact code-golfed implementation. Shadertoy ID: 33jSDc

name: 33KSWz_SpiralOverload.glsl
description: Spiral Overload - Psychedelic spiral patterns with camera movement. Created by diatribes. Features volumetric raymarching with rotating coordinates and division by sine/cosine creating spiral distortions. Multi-scale step patterns and radial color mixing. Shadertoy ID: 33KSWz

name: 33l3zj_Noise42.glsl
description: Noise42 - Red noise pattern with animated vignette. Created by diatribes. Features multi-scale noise accumulation with dynamic vignette that moves and pulses. Red color scheme. Compact implementation. Shadertoy ID: 33l3zj

name: 33lGz4_LittleGemFlight.glsl
description: Little Gem Flight - Fractal gem with oscillating camera position. Created by diatribes. Features 8-iteration fractal with dynamic scaling parameter creating gem-like structure. Camera position oscillates horizontally. Color modulation based on camera position. Distance fade. Shadertoy ID: 33lGz4

name: 33lGzn_KeepGoing.glsl
description: Keep Going - Tunnel flight with fractal structures and noise. Created by diatribes. Features camera following parametric path through tunnel with floor/ceiling constraints. Combines multi-scale noise with 8-iteration box-folding fractal. Rolling camera rotation. Red-tinted color scheme with distance fade and gamma correction. Shadertoy ID: 33lGzn

name: 33scR2_FireSmokeTinkering.glsl
description: Fire & Smoke Tinkering - Volumetric fire and smoke simulation. Created by diatribes. Features two separate volumetric functions (fire and smoke) blended together. Fire uses multi-scale noise with warm color gradient. Smoke uses distorted raymarching with turbulence. Shadertoy ID: 33scR2

name: 33V3Dt_CandyCruise.glsl
description: Candy Cruise - Colorful tunnel with candy-like patterns. Created by diatribes. Features volumetric tunnel with oscillating radius and rotating coordinates. Multi-scale additive and subtractive noise creates candy texture. Camera movement with gentle oscillation. Color cycling based on depth. Shadertoy ID: 33V3Dt

name: 33VGzW_Mycorrhizae.glsl
description: Mycorrhizae [294] - Twisted spiral with multi-scale noise. Created by diatribes. Features raymarched spiral pattern with rotation based on depth. Multi-scale noise distortion creates organic mycorrhizae-like structures. Central light with radial falloff. Code-golfed implementation. Shadertoy ID: 33VGzW

name: 33XGRN_3xGlowPath.glsl
description: 3x Glow Path - Tunnel flight with 3-iteration fractal. Created by diatribes. Features camera following sinusoidal path through tunnel. 3-iteration fractal creates glowing structures. Distance-based color accumulation and distance fade. Shadertoy ID: 33XGRN

name: PAEz - BASEHIT_DETECTION.IMAGE.GLSL
description: FFT Beat Detection Test - Advanced beat detector using low and high frequency bands with flux analysis, coincidence detection, and adaptive thresholding. Visualizes FFT spectrum with color-coded frequency bands and flash effects on detected beats. Test shader for verifying FFT frequency data bucket accuracy.
author: @OneHung

name: Xor-WaveForm.glsl
description: Scrolling Waveform Visualizer by @XorDev - Raymarched 3D waveform with scrolling trails effect. Uses Buffer A for temporal feedback to create flowing waveform history. Features reflections and depth-based coloring. Test shader for audio waveform data visualization.
author: @XorDev

name: FFT-Diagnostic.glsl
description: FFT Diagnostic Tool - Full-spectrum FFT visualizer for verifying audio frequency data. Displays all 512 FFT bins with grid markers every 64 bins. Shows both row 0 and row 1 of audio texture for comparison. Essential test shader for debugging FFT data bucket mapping and frequency response.
author: @OneHung

name: PAEz-DirectTest.glsl
description: Direct Audio Texture Test - Bypasses buffer system to read FFT data directly from audio texture row 0. Simple bar visualization with first 32 bins highlighted in orange. Test shader for verifying direct audio texture access and FFT bin mapping.
author: @OneHung

name: FinalTest-AudioDirect.glsl
description: Audio Texture Row Comparison - Split-screen test comparing row 0 and row 1 of audio texture. Top half shows row 0, bottom half shows row 1. Test shader for verifying FFT data consistency across texture rows and identifying any differences in frequency data storage.
author: @OneHung

name: PAEz - BaseHits.glsl
description: Simplified FFT Bars - Basic FFT spectrum visualizer reading directly from audio texture. Displays frequency bars with first 32 bins highlighted in orange. Includes frequency band highlighting for low and high ranges. Test shader for basic FFT visualization without beat detection complexity.
author: @OneHung

name: Where Is Her Mind Dice.glsl
description: Audio-Reactive D&D Dice Morphing - Single-pass raymarcher that cycles through all six polyhedral dice (D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, D20) with smooth organic morphing transitions. Bass drives scale pulsing and morph speed, mids shift the iridescent hue, highs boost sparkle density. Features chromatic aberration, fresnel rim glow, nested box fractals, and per-channel color phasing for a holographic holofoil look. Based on @Jaenam97's Holofoil Dice.
author: @Jaenam97
